description_long: This object is a modern revolver-style handgun with a robust, metallic frame and a long, cylindrical barrel. The barrel is smooth and features subtle linear grooves along its length, giving it a sleek, industrial appearance. The grip is ergonomically contoured, predominantly black, and appears to be made of a polymer or rubberized material for enhanced handling, with visible finger grooves for comfort. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement and safety. The cylinder is prominent and metallic, designed to hold multiple rounds, and the hammer is exposed at the rear. The overall finish is a combination of matte silver and black, with no visible engravings or decorative markings on the slide or barrel.
description: A modern revolver-style handgun with a long, smooth metallic barrel and a contoured black grip. The design is sleek and functional, with a prominent cylinder and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the contoured black grip, and the exposed hammer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical alignment of the cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, grip, and hammer, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the width of the barrel and grip, as well as the alignment of the cylinder and frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is visually robust and contoured, featuring a black, rubberized or polymer surface with ergonomic finger grooves for improved handling. Its shape is slightly flared at the base for stability, and the surface appears to have a matte, slightly textured finish for a secure hold. No visible logos or embellishments are present, emphasizing a utilitarian design focused on comfort and control.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement and safety. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive embellishments.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and cylindrical with a smooth, unadorned profile, lacking any visible threading, porting, or compensator features. Subtle linear grooves run along its length, and the finish is a matte silver, consistent with the rest of the metallic frame. No external markings or decorative elements are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel. The surfaces are clean and unmarked, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not feature a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is slightly flared and rounded, with a smooth, continuous contour and no visible finger rests, logos, or texturing. The design is simple and functional, focusing on ergonomic handling rather than decorative elements.
